title: GEMglMapGrid2f
description: define a two-dimensional grid for evaluators

messages.description: Specifies the number of partitions in the u direction of the grid.
Specifies the coordinates of the two end points of the u grid.
Specifies the number of partitions in the v direction of the grid.
Specifies the coordinates of the two end points of the v grid.

arguments.description: Specifies the number of partitions in the u direction of the grid.
Specifies the coordinates of the two end points of the u grid.
Specifies the number of partitions in the v direction of the grid.
Specifies the coordinates of the two end points of the v grid.
